PLAY [Deploy web servers] ******************************************************

TASK [Gathering Facts] *********************************************************
ok: [web1]
ok: [web2]

TASK [Install nginx] ***********************************************************
changed: [web1]
changed: [web2]

TASK [Copy config] *************************************************************
ok: [web1]
changed: [web2]

TASK [Start service] ***********************************************************
ok: [web1]
failed: [web2] => {"changed": false, "msg": "Could not start nginx: port 80 in use"}

TASK [Verify health] ***********************************************************
ok: [web1]
fatal: [web2]: FAILED! => {"changed": false, "msg": "health check timed out"}

PLAY RECAP *********************************************************************
web1                       : ok=6    changed=1    unreachable=0    failed=0    skipped=0
web2                       : ok=3    changed=2    unreachable=0    failed=2    skipped=0
